## Type of Change

- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX (visual changes, layout, animations)
- [ ] 🏗️ Architecture (folder structure, configs, infra)
- [ ] 🔧 Bug fix (non-breaking fix)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking addition)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that breaks existing behavior)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation (readme, comments, context files)
- [ ] 🔒 Security (auth, secrets, permissions)
- [ ] 💳 Payments (Stripe, billing, subscriptions)
- [ ] 🤖 AI (Gemini, prompts, conversation engine)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the context files in `/project-context/` before making changes
- [ ] My code follows the conventions in `code-standards.md`
- [ ] I have not modified any `components/ui/*` files (shadcn protected)
- [ ] `bun run lint` passes with no errors
- [ ] `bun run type-check` passes with no errors
- [ ] `bun run build` passes with no errors
- [ ] I have updated `progress-tracker.md` if this completes a unit
- [ ] I have updated relevant context files if architecture changed
- [ ] Dark mode and light mode both work correctly
- [ ] Mobile responsive layout is not broken
